Celebrate the divine occasion of Hanuman Jayanti 2026 with this powerful devotional collection ‚ÄúNamo Anjaneyam‚ÄĚ, a soulful Telugu bhakti song dedicated to Lord Hanuman ūüôŹ

Lord Hanuman, also known as Anjaneya, Bajrangbali, and Maruti, is the symbol of strength, devotion, and protection. Listening to Hanuman devotional songs on this auspicious day is believed to remove obstacles, bring courage, and bless devotees with success and peace.

snippet.title: Karuppu (Tamil) - Trailer | Suriya | RJ Balaji | Trisha |  @SaiAbhyankkar | Dream Warrior | May 14
snippet.description:

Suriya's "Karuppu" Releasing in cinemas worldwide from May 14th  ūüĒ•ūüĒ•

ŗ§§ŗ•áŗ§įŗ•á ŗ§¨ŗ§Ņŗ§®ŗ§ĺ ŗ§łŗ•āŗ§®ŗ§ĺ ŗ§Ļŗ•ą ŗ§úŗ§Ļŗ§ĺŗ§Ā, ŗ§§ŗ•áŗ§įŗ•á ŗ§¨ŗ§Ņŗ§®ŗ§ĺ ŗ§§ŗ§®ŗ•ćŗ§Ļŗ§ĺ ŗ§Ļŗ•ą ŗ§¶ŗ§Ņŗ§≤,
ŗ§§ŗ•áŗ§įŗ•á ŗ§¨ŗ§Ņŗ§®ŗ§ĺ ŗ§Ļŗ§į ŗ§ßŗ§°ŗ§ľŗ§ēŗ§® ŗ§ģŗ•áŗ§ā, ŗ§¨ŗ§ł ŗ§óŗ•āŗ§Āŗ§úŗ§§ŗ§ĺ ŗ§Ļŗ•ą ŗ§§ŗ•áŗ§įŗ§ĺ ŗ§łŗ§Ņŗ§≤ŗ§łŗ§Ņŗ§≤ŗ§ĺŗ•§
ŗ§§ŗ•áŗ§įŗ•Ä ŗ§Įŗ§ĺŗ§¶ŗ•čŗ§ā ŗ§ēŗ•Ä ŗ§öŗ§ĺŗ§¶ŗ§į ŗ§ďŗ§Ęŗ§ľŗ•á, ŗ§Ļŗ§į ŗ§įŗ§ĺŗ§§ ŗ§óŗ•Āŗ§úŗ§ľŗ§į ŗ§úŗ§ĺŗ§§ŗ•Ä ŗ§Ļŗ•ą,
ŗ§§ŗ•áŗ§įŗ•Ä ŗ§§ŗ§łŗ•ćŗ§Ķŗ•Äŗ§į ŗ§Üŗ§Āŗ§Ėŗ•čŗ§ā ŗ§ģŗ•áŗ§ā, ŗ§ęŗ§Ņŗ§į ŗ§≠ŗ•Ä ŗ§Üŗ§Āŗ§Ėŗ•áŗ§ā ŗ§≠ŗ•Äŗ§ó ŗ§úŗ§ĺŗ§§ŗ•Ä ŗ§Ļŗ•ąŗ§āŗ•§

ŗ§¶ŗ§Ņŗ§≤ ŗ§®ŗ•á ŗ§§ŗ•áŗ§įŗ§ĺ ŗ§®ŗ§ĺŗ§ģ ŗ§≤ŗ§Ņŗ§Įŗ§ĺ, ŗ§Ļŗ§į ŗ§łŗ§ĺŗ§Āŗ§ł ŗ§®ŗ•á ŗ§§ŗ•áŗ§įŗ§ĺ ŗ§®ŗ§ĺŗ§ģ ŗ§≤ŗ§Ņŗ§Įŗ§ĺ‚Ä¶ (2)

ŗ§§ŗ•áŗ§įŗ•á ŗ§Ļŗ•čŗ§āŗ§†ŗ•čŗ§ā ŗ§ēŗ•Ä ŗ§ģŗ•Āŗ§łŗ•ćŗ§ēŗ§ĺŗ§® ŗ§ģŗ•áŗ§ā, ŗ§ģŗ•ąŗ§āŗ§®ŗ•á ŗ§Ėŗ•Āŗ§¶ŗ§ĺ ŗ§ēŗ§ĺ ŗ§®ŗ•āŗ§į ŗ§¶ŗ•áŗ§Ėŗ§ĺ,

ŗ§§ŗ•áŗ§įŗ•Ä ŗ§Üŗ§Ķŗ§ĺŗ§úŗ§ľ ŗ§ģŗ•áŗ§ā ŗ§Ķŗ•č ŗ§ģŗ§Ņŗ§†ŗ§ĺŗ§ł ŗ§Ļŗ•ą, ŗ§úŗ•č ŗ§łŗ§ĺŗ§úŗ•čŗ§ā ŗ§ēŗ•č ŗ§úŗ§óŗ§ĺ ŗ§¶ŗ•áŗ§§ŗ•Ä ŗ§Ļŗ•ą,
ŗ§§ŗ•áŗ§įŗ•Ä ŗ§Ėŗ§ĺŗ§ģŗ•čŗ§∂ŗ•Ä ŗ§≠ŗ•Ä ŗ§Öŗ§¨ ŗ§§ŗ•č, ŗ§ģŗ•áŗ§įŗ•Ä ŗ§įŗ•āŗ§Ļ ŗ§ēŗ•č ŗ§łŗ§úŗ§ĺ ŗ§¶ŗ•áŗ§§ŗ•Ä ŗ§Ļŗ•ąŗ•§

ŗ§¶ŗ§Ņŗ§≤ ŗ§®ŗ•á ŗ§§ŗ•áŗ§įŗ§ĺ ŗ§®ŗ§ĺŗ§ģ ŗ§≤ŗ§Ņŗ§Įŗ§ĺ, ŗ§Ļŗ§į ŗ§łŗ§ĺŗ§Āŗ§ł ŗ§®ŗ•á ŗ§§ŗ•áŗ§įŗ§ĺ ŗ§®ŗ§ĺŗ§ģ ŗ§≤ŗ§Ņŗ§Įŗ§ĺ‚Ä¶ (2)

ŗ§ēŗ§≠ŗ•Ä ŗ§§ŗ•áŗ§įŗ•Ä ŗ§¶ŗ•āŗ§įŗ•Ä ŗ§®ŗ•á ŗ§õŗ•ā ŗ§≤ŗ§Ņŗ§Įŗ§ĺ, ŗ§§ŗ•č ŗ§¶ŗ§Ņŗ§≤ ŗ§¨ŗ§Ņŗ§Ėŗ§į ŗ§Čŗ§†ŗ§ĺŗ•§

snippet.title: System - Official Trailer | Sonakshi Sinha, Jyotika, Ashutosh Gowariker | Available In Multi - Audio
snippet.description:
Prime Video India Presents
System Official Trailer 
Starring Sonakshi Sinha, Jyotika, Ashutosh Gowariker
Directed by Ashwiny Iyer Tiwari
Produced by Pammi Baweja, Harman Baweja, Smitha Baliga
Written by Harman Baweja, Arun Sukumar, Ashwiny Iyer Tiwari, Tasneem Lokhandwala, Akshat Ghidial

Official Release Date - May 22, 2026 on Prime Video India

About:
Neha, an ambitious privileged public prosecutor, daughter of renowned lawyer Ravi Rajvansh works tirelessly to prove herself as she has to win 10 cases consecutively to join as a partner in her father‚Äôs firm. Her life is turned upside down when she meets Sarika, a courtroom stenographer who lives in the suburban small clusters of houses sheltering poor in Delhi. In the backdrop of disadvantages, Neha takes on a complex case and stands against her Father against his will to win her 10th case.

Follow us on:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/primevideoin/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/PrimeVideoIN/
X: https://x.com/PrimeVideoIN

ABOUT PRIME VIDEO
Prime Video is a one-stop entertainment destination offering customers a vast collection of premium programming in one application available across several devices. On Prime Video, customers can find their favourite Indian and international original series, movies, TV shows, and more, across multiple languages ‚Äď including Indian-produced Original series like Mirzapur, Farzi, Panchayat, The Family Man, Dhootha, Jubilee, Dahaad, Made in Heaven, Suzhal ‚Äď The Vortex, Inspector Rishi, Poacher, Indian Police Force, Paatal Lok, Rainbow Rishta, Wedding.con; Original movies like Maja Ma, Ammu, Mast Mein Rehne Ka; popular global Originals like Citadel, The Lord of The Rings: The Rings of Power, Fallout, Reacher, The Boys, The Wheel of Time, Road House, The Idea of You; some of the biggest post-theatrical films; direct-to-service films such as Shershaah, Soorarai Pottru, Sardar Udham, Bawaal, Gehraiyaan, Jai Bhim, Jalsa, Sherni, Narappa, Sarpatta Parambarai, Kuruthi, Joji, Malik, Pippa, HOME, Sharmajee Ki Beti, and many more of such titles. Additionally, Prime Video‚Äôs video entertainment marketplace, offers customers programming from partners such as Lionsgate Play, Discovery+ Crunchyroll, BBC Player, Sony Pictures ‚Äď Stream, MGM+, FanCode, Chaupal, Manorama Max, Eros Now, Hoichoi, Anime Times, to name a few, via Prime Video add-on-subscriptions, as well as the option to rent movies, regardless of whether customers have a Prime membership or not. Customers can also go behind the scenes of their favorite movies and series with exclusive X-Ray access. Prime Video is one benefit among many that provides savings, convenience, and entertainment as part of the Prime membership. For more info visit www.amazon.com/primevideo.

As he cares for her paralyzed husband, Nishant, Vimal slowly realizes that every person in the house ‚ÄĒ Martha, Alice, and even Raushan ‚ÄĒ has a motive to see Nishant dead, each hiding private debts, fears, and desires. snippet.title: Aakhri Sawal Official Trailer | Sanjay Dutt | Namashi | Amit Sadh | Sameera Reddy | 15 May Release
snippet.description:
What happens when the truth refuses to stay buried?
Watch the trailer of #AakhriSawal ‚ÄĒ where every answer comes at a cost.

What begins as an academic accusation soon explodes into a nationwide debate.
Aakhri Sawal follows Vicky, a brilliant yet volatile scholar, who publicly challenges his mentor ‚ÄĒ the legendary Professor Gopal Nadkarni ‚ÄĒ accusing him of institutional bias.
As media outrage, political agendas, and public opinion collide, the confrontation transforms into a dangerous psychological chess match.
From the Gandhi assassination to the Emergency, no truth is left untouched.
But beneath the arguments lies a far deeper mystery.
Why is Vicky really asking these questions?
As buried secrets begin to surface, one final question threatens to change everything.
The Question India Never Stopped Asking.
In Cinemas on 15th May

Cast
Sanjay Dutt as Professor Gopal Nadkarni
Namashi Chakraborty as Vicky Hegde
Amit Sadh as Aditya Rao
Sameera Reddy as Professor Pallavi Menon
Neetu Chandra as Kavya Rawat

Rockey Raina as Sohraab
Archana Iyer as Vicky‚Äôs Mother
Bipin Nadkarni as Bipin Chaudhary

snippet.title: Hum Yaar Hain Tumhare Dildar Hai Tumhare | Alka Yagnik, Kumar Sanu | Abhishek Bachchan , Karisma
snippet.description:
Song Credits:
Singers: Alka Yagnik, Kumar Sanu
Music Director: Nadeem - Shravan
Lyricist: Sameer
Edit & Gfx : Nadeem Akhtar (Paperboyz Studioz)

Movie Cast & Crew:
Producer: Suneel Darshan
Director: Dharmesh Darshan
Cast: Akshay Kumar, Abhishek Bachchan, Karishma Kapoor

Lyrics:
Hum pyaar hain tumhare
Dildar hain tumhaare
Humse mila karo, humse mila karo
Koi shikwa agar ho
Aur shikaayat agar ho
Humse gila karo par tum mila karo
Jaan maine bhi pyaar kiya haiHaan maine bhi pyaar kiya hai

Hum pyaar hain tumhare
Dildar hain tumhaare
Humse mila karo, humse mila karo
Koi shikwa agar ho
Aur shikaayat agar ho
Humse gila karo par tum mila karo
Jaan maine bhi pyaar kiya hai

Haan maine bhi pyaar kiya hai
Hum pyaar hain tumhare
Dildar hain tumhaare
Humse mila karo, humse mila karo

There is a friend for little children
Above the bright blue skies
A friend who never changes
Whose love never dies
Unlike our friends by nature
Who change with changing years
This friend is always with us
His name is god alone

Kaise main bhula doon woh beete huye pal
Har lamha sataaye woh gujaraa hua kal
Kaise main bataun yeh mushkil raaz hai
Kal aaye na kabhi jo hai woh aaj hai
Meri jaan paas aa ke bol do
Muskura ke chup na raha karo
Chup na raha karo
Koi shikwa agar ho
Aur shikaayat agar ho
Humse gila karo par mila karo

Aa..

Phoolon ki waadiyan, barfeele raaste
Hain jaan-e-tamanna sab tere vaaste
Phoolon mein hai chubhan
Sardi mein agan hai
Saanson mein raat din
Yeh kaisi jalan hai
He he he he he he he
Ha ha ha ha he he he he
Sard thandi havaaein
Keh rahi hain fizaayein
Yun na jalaa karo
Yun na jalaa karo
Koi shikwa agar ho
Aur shikaayat agar ho
Humse gila karo par tum mila karo

Hum pyaar hain tumhare
Dildar hain tumhaare
Humse mila karo, humse mila karo
Koi shikwa agar ho
Aur shikaayat agar ho
Humse gila karo par tum mila karo
Haan maine bhi pyaar kiya hai

Na Hilo Jaye.. Na Chigo
Aaj Meri Chhati Si Toote
Piya Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei...

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei
Haan Gori Nazar Lagi Deekhei
Ja Sabre Gaam Me Top Lugai Bas Tu Hi Deekhe

Koi Radua Maare Siti
Dekh Koi Bolo Butterfly

Aur Naam Bata De Raduan Ko
Do Minute Me Karu Kutayi
Haan Tu Bhi Kare Na Laad Piya
Mope Daanti Si Meense

Aur Lal Kilo Tere Naam Karay Du

Moye Dekh Ke Devar Ek Aankh Te
Photo So Kheenche

Piya Mero Jee So Cho Ghabrave
Rang Mero Neelo Padto Aawe
Baidh Bulaye De...
Jhaaro Jaldi Tu Moku Lagvaye De...

Teri Nazar Utaaru Mantar Maar Kein..

snippet.title: ŗ§úŗ§ĺŗ§®ŗ•á ŗ§ēŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ•čŗ§ā ŗ§≤ŗ•čŗ§ó ŗ§ģŗ•čŗ§Ļŗ§¨ŗ•ćŗ§¨ŗ§§ ŗ§ēŗ§Ņŗ§Įŗ§ĺ | Mehboob Ki Mehndi | Lata Mangeshkar Songs | Leena Chandavarkar
snippet.description:
ūüé∂ Welcome to a journey through the golden era of Hindi music, where the melodies of Lata Mangeshkar reigned supreme. Today, we immerse ourselves in the poignant beauty of "Jane Kyon Log Mohabbat Kiya" from the movie Mehboob Ki Mehndi. This song, a timeless classic from the 1970s, captures the essence of love, longing, and the bittersweet realities of the human heart. Lata Ji's ethereal voice, combined with the song's heartfelt lyrics, creates an unforgettable experience that resonates with generations. It speaks of love, loss, hope, and despair, all woven together in a tapestry of emotions. 



Credits :

Song: Jane Kyon Log Mohabbat Kiya
Album: Mehboob Ki Mehndi
Artist: Lata Mangeshkar
Music Director: Laxmikant-Pyarelal
Lyricist: Anand Bakshi 



Lyrics :

is zamane me, is mohabat ne
kitne dil tode, kitne ghar phunke
jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai
jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai
dil ke badale darde dil liya karate hai
jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai

tanhayi milti hai, mahafil nahi milti
rahe mahobat me kabhi manzil nahi milti
dil tut jata hai, nakam hota hai
ulfat ye logo ka yahi anjam hota hai
koi kya jane, kyu ye parawane,
kyu machalate hai, gum me jalate hai
aahe bhar bhar ke diwane jiya karate hai
aahe bhar bhar ke diwane jiya karate hai
jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai

sawan me aankho ko, kitana rulati hai
furasat me jab dil ko kisi ki yaad aati hai
ye zindagi yu hi barabad hoti hai
har waqt hotho pe koi fariyad hoti hai
na dawao ka naam chalata hai
na duao se kam chalata hai
zahar ye phir bhi sabhi kyu piya karate hai
zahar ye phir bhi sabhi kyu piya karate hai
jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai

mahabub se har gum manasub hota hai
din rat ulfat me tamasha khub hota hai
rato se bhi lambe ye pyar ke kise
aashiq sunate hai zafa ye yaar ke kise
bemurawat hai, bewafa hai wo,
us sitamagar ka apne dilwar ka,
naam le leke duhayi diya karate hai
naam le leke duhayi diya karate hai
jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai

If you're moved by this timeless melody, give it a thumbs up! Share your favorite Lata Mangeshkar song in the comments below, and don't forget to subscribe for more golden gems from the world of Hindi music. Let the magic of music live on‚Ä¶

snippet.title: Thalli Pogura From ‚ÄúMust Date The Playboy‚ÄĚ - Official Music Video - T Suriavelan | Deepthi Suresh
snippet.description:
#mustdatetheplayboy #mdtp #suriavelan #zayn #tara #zara 

Catch #ThalliPogura on Must Date the Playboy Episode 5 (Youtube Version), releasing this Wednesday 13th May. 

Composed, Written and Directed by T Suriavelan, The song is performed by T Suriavelan alongside Deepthi Suresh. ‚ÄúThalli Pogura‚ÄĚ is an official soundtrack from the Hit Mediacorp Series ‚ÄúMust Date the Playboy‚ÄĚ

Available on all Major Streaming Platforms 

Listen to Thalli Pogura on Spotify : https://open.spotify.com/track/4eHDGU8GRAZwz5p4MymXAX?si=wrGiAU21TdGaZRUQycagvw

Listen to Thalli Pogura on ITunes : https://music.apple.com/sg/album/thalli-pogura/1893409142?i=1893409157

Written & Composed by T Suriavelan

Lyrics:
Kondsa, let your work go, the one with whom the whole village goes.

The children of the city were fans, when the name of Ram was on their lips.
Come on, let the ship sail and the bridge sail, let my village's tradition continue.

All the men are crazy about jail, ships worth 80 lakhs sail.
Oh, the whole circle of friends, in which there are brothers.

O world, Holi fan, you're crazy, you're praised a lot.

Hey, the flag is flying, the Swaraj is flying, you idiots, let's go!

Come on, let the ships sail and the boats sail, let our Gama tradition continue.

All the people are in jail, ships worth 80 lakhs are sailing.

From the shop to Dabwali, and from the site to Gurgaon.

snippet.title: Snap - Sumit Parta (Official Music Video) | New Haryanvi Song 2026
snippet.description:
Presenting the new Haryanvi romantic song 2026 ‚Äď ‚ÄúSnap‚ÄĚ by Sumit Parta | Real Music 

A fresh and heartfelt new Haryanvi love song by Sumit Parta, blending modern romance with desi emotions and soulful melodies. Packed with charming lyrics, soft vibes, and emotional storytelling, this track beautifully captures the feeling of falling deeply in love.

From late-night chats and cute snaps to dreams of forever together, Snap reflects the innocent side of modern relationships with a perfect mix of Haryanvi swag and emotional connection. Sumit Parta brings a softer romantic vibe in this track while still keeping his signature desi style alive.

Cute Moments. Real Feelings. Pure Love Vibes.
Whether it‚Äôs her smile, her care, or the way she says your name ‚ÄĒ Snap turns those little moments into timeless memories.

With catchy hooks, relatable lyrics, and a feel-good romantic atmosphere, this song is perfect for couples, reels, and late-night playlists.

ūüéĶ Song Credits:
Title: Snap
Singer/Lyricst/Composer: Sumit Parta
Music: Xtacy

Director: Jerry Batra
Editor: Raghav Jhamb 
Line Production: Ok Report Productions
Female Artist: Maria 
Makeup: Albina

Producer: Dinesh Golan
Music Label & Copyrights: Real Music Production
Distribution Partner: EYP Creations & Warner Music India
Promotions Partner: Nyx Media & Eyp Creations
Publicity Design & Digitally Managed By: Prince Pannu

en-IN.title: Snap - Sumit Parta (Official Music Video) | New Haryanvi Song 2026
en-IN.description:
Presenting the new Haryanvi romantic song 2026 ‚Äď ‚ÄúSnap‚ÄĚ by Sumit Parta | Real Music 

A fresh and heartfelt new Haryanvi love song by Sumit Parta, blending modern romance with desi emotions and soulful melodies. Packed with charming lyrics, soft vibes, and emotional storytelling, this track beautifully captures the feeling of falling deeply in love.

From late-night chats and cute snaps to dreams of forever together, Snap reflects the innocent side of modern relationships with a perfect mix of Haryanvi swag and emotional connection. Sumit Parta brings a softer romantic vibe in this track while still keeping his signature desi style alive.

Cute Moments. Real Feelings. Pure Love Vibes.
Whether it‚Äôs her smile, her care, or the way she says your name ‚ÄĒ Snap turns those little moments into timeless memories.

With catchy hooks, relatable lyrics, and a feel-good romantic atmosphere, this song is perfect for couples, reels, and late-night playlists.

snippet.title: Tuesday Palani And Tiruchendur Murugan Songs | Vel Vel Muruga Haro Hara | Murugan Tamil Bhakti Songs
snippet.description:
Tuesday Palani And Tiruchendur Murugan Songs | Vel Vel Muruga Haro Hara | Murugan Tamil Bhakti Songs

Experience the divine blessings of Lord Murugan with this powerful collection of Tuesday Special Palani & Tiruchendur Murugan Songs. Chant ‚ÄúVel Vel Muruga Haro Hara‚ÄĚ and immerse yourself in pure devotion through these soul-stirring Tamil bhakti songs.

Lord Murugan, also known as Kartikeya, Subramanya, and Skanda, is worshipped as the remover of obstacles and the giver of courage, wisdom, and victory. Listening to Murugan songs, especially on Tuesdays, is believed to bring peace, success, and spiritual strength.

This devotional collection features songs dedicated to Palani Murugan and Tiruchendur Murugan, two of the most sacred abodes of Lord Muruga. Let the divine vibrations of these songs purify your mind and fill your life with positivity and prosperity.

ūüôŹ Play this during:

Tuesday pooja
Morning prayers
Temple rituals
Meditation & spiritual practice

‚ú® May Lord Murugan bless you with health, wealth, and happiness!

 
#MuruganSongs #TamilBhaktiSongs #VelVelMuruga #HaroHara #MuruganDevotional

Na hothon say lagai ,,
Gajab toh dekho yaaro ,,
Usne aankho say pillai ,,

Pehle toh najar milaai ,
Dekh kay muskuraayi/ muskaaayi
Gajab toh dekho yaaro ,
Usne aankho say pilaayi ,,


Tujh jaisi na koi teeno lok may , 
Sabkuch lutaa du tere shounk may ,,
Tum or shraab miley hue ho ,,
Rehne ni dete dono hosh may ,,


Chanachal kajraari aankeyy ,,
Haaye shikaari aankehi ,,
Dil pay chalaye churriya 
Teri kataari aankhein ,,

Naagin c haaye julfey ,,
Kaali ghataye julfey ,,
Maaregi toba toba ,,
Teri blaaye julfey ,,

Tootay chaand ka garur ,
Tere cehray ka Noor ,,
Tujhey dekh dekh hota hai deewane ko sarur ,,

Tujh jaisi na koi teeno lok may , 
Sabkuch lutaa du tere shounk may ,,
Tum or shraab miley hue ho ,,
Rehne ni dete dono hosh may ,,

Welcome to our Tamil Devotional Channel, your ultimate destination for soulful and uplifting Tamil devotional songs. Dive into the divine with our carefully curated collections designed to inspire and bring peace to your soul every day of the week.

Daily Devotional Songs:
* Monday Tamil Devotional Songs
* Tuesday Tamil Devotional Songs
* Wednesday Tamil Devotional Songs
* Thursday Tamil Devotional Songs
* Friday Tamil Devotional Songs
* Saturday Tamil Devotional Songs
* Sunday Tamil Devotional Songs

Special Devotional Collections:
* Shiva Tamil Devotional Songs: Celebrate the power and grace of Lord Shiva.
* Vishnu Tamil Devotional Songs: Immerse in the blessings of Lord Vishnu.
* Muruga Tamil Devotional Songs: Invoke the valor and blessings of Lord Muruga.
* Hanuman Tamil Devotional Songs: Feel the strength and devotion of Lord Hanuman.
* Amman Tamil Devotional Songs: Honor the divine mother in her various forms.
* Saibaba Tamil Devotional Songs: Seek the blessings of Shirdi Sai Baba.
* Balaji Tamil Devotional Songs: Worship Lord Venkateswara with these soulful songs.
* Lakshmi Tamil Devotional Songs: Attract prosperity with hymns for Goddess Lakshmi.
* Devi Tamil Devotional Songs: Praise the supreme goddess Devi in her many avatars.
* Ganesh Tamil Devotional Songs: Start your day with prayers to Lord Ganesha.

Special Occasions and Deities:
* Amavasai Tamil Devotional Songs: Songs for the new moon day rituals.
* Pradosham Tamil Devotional Songs: Hymns for the auspicious Pradosham period.
* Ashta Lakshmi Tamil Devotional Songs: Songs dedicated to the eight forms of Goddess Lakshmi.
* Vinayagar Tamil Devotional Songs: Devotions for the remover of obstacles, Lord Vinayagar.
* Ganapathi Tamil Devotional Songs: Invoke blessings from Lord Ganapathi.
* Surya Tamil Devotional Songs: Worship the Sun God, Surya, with these melodies.
* Sani Tamil Devotional Songs: Appease Lord Sani with these devotional tracks.
* Guru Tamil Devotional Songs: Songs to honor Guru and seek his wisdom.
* Perumal Tamil Devotional Songs: Devote to Lord Perumal with these spiritual songs.
* Navagraha Tamil Devotional Songs: Balance your energies with songs for the nine planets.

Subscribe now and join our spiritual journey. Like, share, and hit the bell icon to stay updated with our latest devotional uploads. May these divine songs bring peace, prosperity, and positivity to your life.
